response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks clear evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams beyond 10 people, or designing financial risk/credit systems — key requirements for a CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record in distributed systems, event-driven architecture, and real-time data handling
Strong engineering culture advocacy through testing, CI/CD, and knowledge sharing initiatives
concerns: No demonstrable experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulatory compliance systems
Lacks evidence of scaling engineering teams to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
No clear production track record in model-agnostic, auditable multi-agent systems with financial consequences
